title: adenothamnus validus
intro: Adenothamnus validus, also known as the coast everlasting or woolly marigold, is a shrub native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon in the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenothamnus validus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Adenothamnus validus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make salves, creams, and other topical applications.
